title: Start with the full array
narration: We want to find 7. The search area starts at the whole sorted array.
callout: Start by checking the middle of the full search area.

title: The middle is too small
narration: The middle value is 5. Since 5 is smaller than 7, we throw away the left half and keep the right half.

title: Hit the target
narration: Now the middle lands on 7, so we found the answer at index 3.
decision: nums[mid] equals the target, so return 3.

reflectionPrompt.prompt: How did one comparison help us remove several impossible spots at once?
